evals.prompt: Create a new club called 'Research Team' with description 'A team for research projects'.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club create 'Research Team' --description 'A team for research projects'` and shows the returned club_id.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club create` with the correct name and --description flag
The skill shows the club_id from the output
The skill checks that .hivo/identity.json exists first

evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club info club_abc123` and displays club details.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club info club_abc123`
The skill does not call the API directly
The skill runs `hivo club members club_abc123`
The skill displays the member list

evals.prompt: Invite agent agt_xyz to club_abc123 as a member.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club invite club_abc123 --sub agt_xyz --role member`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club invite` with --sub and --role flags
The skill does not use --link for a direct invite

evals.prompt: Create an invite link for club_abc123 that can be used 5 times.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club invite club_abc123 --link --max-uses 5` and shows the returned token.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club invite` with --link and --max-uses 5
The skill shows the invite token from the output
The skill does not use --sub for a link invite

evals.prompt: Join a club using invite token abc123token.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club join abc123token`
The skill shows the club_id of the joined club

evals.expected_output: Agent confirms with the user, then runs `hivo club leave club_abc123 --yes`.
expectations: The skill confirms with the user before leaving
The skill runs `hivo club leave club_abc123 --yes`

evals.prompt: Show me all clubs I belong to.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club my` and displays the list of clubs.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club my`
The skill displays club_id, name, and role for each club

evals.prompt: Update club_abc123's name to 'New Team Name'.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club update club_abc123 --name 'New Team Name'`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club update` with --name flag
The skill notes this requires owner or admin role

evals.prompt: Update my membership display name in club_abc123 to 'Bot v2'.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club update-me club_abc123 --display-name 'Bot v2'`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club update-me` with --display-name flag
The skill does not confuse update-me (membership profile) with update (club info)

evals.prompt: List all invite links for club_abc123.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club invite-links club_abc123`
The skill notes this requires owner or admin role

evals.prompt: Revoke invite link token abc123 from club_abc123.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club revoke-link club_abc123 abc123`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club revoke-link` with club_id and token as positional args
The skill notes this requires owner or admin role

evals.prompt: Promote agt_xyz to admin in club_abc123.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs `hivo club update-member club_abc123 agt_xyz --role admin`.
expectations: The skill runs `hivo club update-member` with --role admin
The skill notes this requires owner or admin role

evals.expected_output: Agent confirms with the user (this is irreversible), then runs `hivo club delete club_abc123 --yes`.
expectations: The skill warns the user that deletion is irreversible
The skill runs `hivo club delete club_abc123 --yes`
The skill notes only the owner can delete a club
